name: Ray Bolger
abstract: Raymond Wallace Bolger (; January 10, 1904 – January 15, 1987) was an American actor, dancer, singer, vaudevillian, and stage performer (particularly musical theater) who started his movie career in the silent-film era. Bolger was a major Broadway performer in the 1930s and beyond.

concerts.label: Benefit: Jewish Community Center of Saranac Lake

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: Ray Bolger and Tom Patricola and James Bodden and Jack Donahue and the Misconi Brothers. They were dancing then... I was a Fred Astaire, I was a Ray Bolger... but I didn't have their style.
